title: Happy Memorial Day!
excerpt: I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and a waterbrush that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger . If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
body: I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and a waterbrush that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
